name: ds-voice-lan
description: Minimal Discord-like voice room over IP and port for Windows
author: OpenAI Codex

scripts.dist: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --win nsis --publish never
scripts.release:github: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --win nsis --publish always
